description: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the development and commercialization of therapeutic candidates for the treatment of cardiovascular, metabolic and liver diseases. The company is headquartered in West Conshohocken, Pennsylvania.
